penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. Task shows suturing in progress but no final knot completion or suture cutting was observed.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion status. Claude reports incomplete task at maximum time (600s), while GPT reports completion at 240s with suture cutting. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks, Claude's assessment takes precedence as incomplete task penalties override all other scoring considerations per FLS rubric.
